servers.description: Spring Voyage API (development default; override via adapter BaseUrl)

post.summary: Create a new API token

get.summary: List all API tokens for the current user

delete.summary: Revoke an API token by name

get.summary: Get the current authenticated user's profile
Get platform version, build hash, and license metadata
List every tenant in the platform registry

post.summary: Create a new tenant record

get.summary: Get a single tenant record by id

patch.summary: Update a tenant record's mutable fields (display name)

delete.summary: Soft-delete a tenant record

get.summary: List all registered agents

post.summary: Create a new agent

get.summary: Get agent status by sending a StatusQuery message

patch.summary: Update the agent's metadata (model, specialty, enabled, execution mode)

delete.summary: Delete an agent

get.summary: Get the agent's configured skill list (tool names the agent is allowed to invoke)

put.summary: Replace the agent's skill list in full; empty list means the agent is disabled from every tool

post.summary: Deploy (or reconcile) a persistent agent's backing container
Tear down a persistent agent's backing container (idempotent)
Adjust replica count for a persistent agent (OSS core supports 0 or 1 today)

get.summary: Read the container logs for a persistent agent
Get the current deployment state of a persistent agent (container + health)
Get the agent's persisted execution block

put.summary: Upsert one or more fields on the agent's execution block (partial update)

delete.summary: Clear the agent's execution block (strip all fields)

get.summary: List all registered units

post.summary: Create a new unit

get.summary: Get unit details and members

patch.summary: Update mutable unit metadata (displayName, description, model, color)

delete.summary: Delete a unit

post.summary: Create a unit by applying a raw unit manifest YAML document
Create a unit from one of the templates listed by /api/v1/packages/templates

get.summary: Check whether a unit is ready to leave Draft and be started
get.description: Returns readiness status and a list of missing requirements. Useful for the UI to enable/disable the Start button.

post.summary: Start the runtime container for a unit
Stop the runtime container for a unit
Re-run backend validation for a unit in Error or Stopped state
post.description: Transitions the unit into Validating and kicks off a new UnitValidationWorkflow run. The handler returns immediately — progress is observable via SSE ValidationProgress events and the terminal state is written back by the workflow.

get.summary: List all members of a unit (agents and sub-units)
get.description: Returns the full member list from the unit actor, including both agent-scheme and unit-scheme members.

post.summary: Add a member to a unit

delete.summary: Remove a member from a unit

get.summary: Get a pointer to the unit's active connector binding, or 404 if unbound

delete.summary: Unbind the unit from whatever connector it was wired to

patch.summary: Set permission level for a human within a unit

delete.summary: Remove a human's permission entry from a unit

get.summary: Get all human permissions for a unit
List the agents that belong to this unit (members with scheme=agent), enriched with each agent's metadata

post.summary: Assign an agent to this unit. Creates a membership row (M:N per #160) and adds the agent to the unit's members list; no conflict is raised if the agent is also a member of another unit.

delete.summary: Unassign an agent from this unit. Deletes the membership row and removes the agent from the unit's members list; other memberships the agent holds are unaffected.

get.summary: Get the unit's governance policy

put.summary: Upsert the unit's governance policy

get.summary: List every unit this agent belongs to, with per-membership config overrides
List every agent that is a member of this unit, with per-membership config overrides

put.summary: Create or update the per-membership config overrides for an agent in this unit

delete.summary: Remove an agent's membership of this unit

get.summary: List installed packages with per-package content counts
List unit templates discovered in the packages tree
Returns the raw YAML for a unit template inside a package
Returns detailed contents of a single package

post.summary: Export an installed package back to its original package.yaml manifest. Supply either unitName or installId (not both). Use withValues=true to materialise resolved input values; secret inputs are emitted as placeholder references, never as cleartext.
Send a message routed via the message router

get.summary: Get a single message (envelope + body) by id
List all directory entries
Find directory entries by role

post.summary: Search the expertise directory (#542)
post.description: Free-text + structured search over the expertise directory. Outside a unit boundary, only projected entries are returned; inside, callers see the full aggregated scope. Step 1 is lexical / full-text — semantic search is tracked as a follow-up.

get.summary: Get an agent's configured expertise domains

put.summary: Replace an agent's configured expertise domains

get.summary: Get a unit's own (non-aggregated) expertise domains

put.summary: Replace a unit's own (non-aggregated) expertise domains

get.summary: Get the effective (recursive-aggregated) expertise of a unit
get.description: Walks the unit's member graph to the leaves, returning every capability contributed by the unit or any descendant, annotated with the contributing origin and the path from this unit to it.

get.summary: Get the unit's boundary configuration

put.summary: Upsert the unit's boundary configuration

delete.summary: Clear every boundary rule on the unit

get.summary: Get the unit's persisted orchestration strategy

put.summary: Upsert the unit's orchestration strategy

delete.summary: Clear the unit's orchestration strategy (fall back to inferred / default)

get.summary: Get the unit's persisted execution defaults

put.summary: Upsert one or more fields on the unit's execution defaults (partial update)

delete.summary: Clear the unit's execution defaults (strip the block)

post.summary: Create a clone of an agent

get.summary: List clones of an agent
Get clone status

delete.summary: Delete a clone

put.summary: Upsert the persistent cloning policy for an agent

delete.summary: Clear the persistent cloning policy for an agent

get.summary: Get the tenant-wide persistent cloning policy

put.summary: Upsert the tenant-wide persistent cloning policy

delete.summary: Clear the tenant-wide persistent cloning policy

Get per-model cost breakdown for an agent

Query activity events with filters and pagination
Stream activity events via SSE
List threads derived from the activity event stream
Get a single thread (summary + ordered events)

post.summary: Thread a new message into an existing thread
Close (abort) an in-flight or pending thread across all participating agents

get.summary: List threads awaiting the current human caller

post.summary: Record that the current human has read the specified inbox thread

get.summary: Get throughput counters (messages / turns / tool calls) per source over a time range
Get wait-time rollups per source; durations are computed from paired StateChanged lifecycle transitions
Get a zero-filled cost time-series for an agent, suitable for sparkline rendering
Get a zero-filled cost time-series for a unit, suitable for sparkline rendering
Get an aggregated dashboard summary with unit/agent counts, status breakdown, recent activity, and total cost
Get a summary of all registered agents
Get a summary of all registered units
Get aggregated cost data
Synthesized tenant → units → agents tree with multi-parent alias edges
Read the unit's short-term and long-term memory entries (stub; full contract deferred to ADR-0029 Stage 4)
Read the agent's short-term and long-term memory entries (stub; full contract deferred to ADR-0029 Stage 4)
List every tool exposed by every registered skill registry

post.summary: Provision a connector type platform-wide (PlatformOperator only; idempotent)

delete.summary: Deprovision a connector type platform-wide (PlatformOperator only)

get.summary: List every connector installed on the current tenant
Get a single installed connector on the current tenant by slug or id

delete.summary: Unbind (uninstall) the connector from the current tenant

get.summary: List every unit bound to the given connector type (#520)

post.summary: Bind (install) the connector on the current tenant (idempotent)

patch.summary: Replace the tenant-scoped install configuration for a connector

post.summary: Validate a candidate credential against the connector's backing service; records the outcome in the credential-health store

get.summary: Get the current credential-health row for a connector on the current tenant
Get the GitHub connector config bound to a unit

put.summary: Bind a unit to GitHub and upsert its per-unit config

get.summary: List GitHub App installations visible to the configured App
Get the GitHub App install URL the wizard should redirect the user through
List repositories visible to the GitHub App, aggregated across installations, optionally scoped to the current user's identity via session_id
List collaborators on a repository visible to the GitHub App
Get the JSON Schema describing the GitHub connector config body

post.summary: Start an OAuth authorization flow and return the GitHub authorize URL

get.summary: Consume the OAuth callback: validate state, exchange code, issue a session

post.summary: Revoke the GitHub grant for the session and delete the local record

get.summary: Return session metadata (login, scopes, expires_at) — never the token
Get the arxiv connector config bound to a unit

put.summary: Bind a unit to arxiv and upsert its per-unit config

get.summary: Get the JSON Schema describing the arxiv connector config body
Get the web-search connector config bound to a unit

get.summary: List the web-search providers currently registered in this host
Get the JSON Schema describing the web-search connector config body
List every agent runtime installed on the current tenant
Get a single installed agent runtime by id

delete.summary: Uninstall the runtime from the current tenant

get.summary: Get the tenant's configured model list for an installed agent runtime

post.summary: Install the runtime on the current tenant (idempotent)

patch.summary: Replace the tenant-scoped configuration for an installed runtime

get.summary: Get the tenant-scoped configuration slot for an installed runtime
Get the current credential-health row for a runtime on the current tenant

post.summary: Probe the runtime with the supplied credential and record the outcome in the credential-health store; does not touch the model catalog
Best-effort live-catalog lookup; replaces the tenant's configured model list on success

get.summary: List secret metadata for a unit. Never returns plaintext or store keys.

post.summary: Register a unit-scoped secret. Provide exactly one of 'value' (pass-through write) or 'externalStoreKey' (bind existing reference).

put.summary: Rotate a unit-scoped secret by appending a new version. Returns the new version number. Prior versions remain resolvable via the pin overload until pruned.

delete.summary: Delete a unit-scoped secret (all versions). Underlying plaintext is removed only for platform-owned versions; external references leave the external store key untouched.

get.summary: List retained versions for a unit-scoped secret. Metadata only; never returns plaintext or store keys.

post.summary: Prune older versions of a unit-scoped secret, retaining the N most-recent. 'keep' must be >= 1; the current version is always retained.

get.summary: List secret metadata for the current tenant. Never returns plaintext or store keys.

post.summary: Register a tenant-scoped secret. Provide exactly one of 'value' (pass-through write) or 'externalStoreKey' (bind existing reference).

put.summary: Rotate a tenant-scoped secret by appending a new version. Returns the new version number.

delete.summary: Delete a tenant-scoped secret (all versions). Underlying plaintext is removed only for platform-owned versions; external references leave the external store key untouched.

get.summary: List retained versions for a tenant-scoped secret. Metadata only; never returns plaintext or store keys.

post.summary: Prune older versions of a tenant-scoped secret, retaining the N most-recent. 'keep' must be >= 1.

get.summary: List platform-scoped secret metadata. Never returns plaintext or store keys.

post.summary: Register a platform-scoped secret. Provide exactly one of 'value' (pass-through write) or 'externalStoreKey' (bind existing reference).

put.summary: Rotate a platform-scoped secret by appending a new version. Returns the new version number.

delete.summary: Delete a platform-scoped secret (all versions). Underlying plaintext is removed only for platform-owned versions; external references leave the external store key untouched.

get.summary: List retained versions for a platform-scoped secret. Metadata only; never returns plaintext or store keys.

post.summary: Prune older versions of a platform-scoped secret, retaining the N most-recent. 'keep' must be >= 1.

get.summary: Report whether an LLM provider's credentials / endpoint are configured and usable on the named dispatch path
Return the cached startup configuration validation report

post.summary: Receive a GitHub webhook event
